Defines a JerryScript sample application task configuration for Zephyr.

# Purpose
The file defines a task configuration for a JerryScript sample application. It specifies a task named `TASKA` with a priority level of `7`, an entry point labeled `main`, a stack size of `2048`, and assigns it to the group `[EXE]`. This configuration is used to manage task execution parameters within the application.
